2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values

5.description: reduce quick-clay areas to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

7.description: compute distance from each Trondheim building to municipality centroid

8.description: keep only buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay areas

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT MAX(skredrisikokvikkleireklasse::int) AS max_class FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse::int = 5
AND ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'));

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values

3.description: get maximum quick-clay risk class if numeric (high risk)

4.description: select quick-clay polygons filtered to high risk class

5.description: select buildings in the Trondheim municipality

6.description: find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance)
